programme.title: Bhagam Bhag
programme.desc: Bunty and Babla are two wannabe actors and want to play the lead in their theatre's play. Soon, their inappropriate behaviour causes the female lead to quit and they get tasked to finding another which hilariously lands them in a convoluted trouble.

programme.title: Bobby Jasoos
programme.desc: A rich man asks Bobby, a private detective, to find two girls and a boy in return for a huge sum. Although she accomplishes the assigned tasks, she struggles to understand the motive behind them.

programme.title: Raavan
programme.desc: A bandit kidnaps a police officer's wife as revenge, but the lines between good and evil blur.

programme.title: Bollywood Diaries
programme.desc: Rohit, Vishnu, and Imli are aspiring actors who come from different backgrounds and dream to make it big in Bollywood. However, each of them must diligently brave both internal and professional struggles to even survive in the coveted industry.
